mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE payment_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time <= #{endDate}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE payment_status = 1 AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time <= #{endDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE register_time < #{date}

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 END), 0), COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY) THEN 1 END), 0), COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY) THEN 1 END), 0), COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) THEN 1 END), 0), COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) THEN 1 END), 0), COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 END), 0), COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END), 0) FROM orders
